description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this silver handbag from yelloe comes with a quilted upper and a spacious inner to hold your daily essentials.Height: 28 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 7 cmSynthetic leather upper with brand badge on the frontOne main compartment with fabric lining, a zippered pocket and two pouchesTwo chain and synthetic handlesQuilted patterning on the upperCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
